NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 12/1/08 AT 11:15 AM IN DEPARTMENT 206. PLAINTIFF COUNSEL TO CONTACT DEPARTMENT 220 FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE DATES AND SEND SENT NOTICE TO ALL PARTIES. Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Foster Wheeler Llc (Fka Foster Wheeler Corporation) To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition
Off Calendar Nov-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Oren P. Noah, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Lamar Everson and Quida Everson
Shelley Tinkoff, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Foster Wheeler

After hearing, Plaintiff Lamar Everson and Quida Everson's motion to compel the deposition of the person most knowledgeable of defendant Foster Wheeler is granted in part and denied in part. The request to conduct the deposition of the person most knowledgeable and to produce documents regarding the USS Quincy was denied. If plaintiff has evidence that plaintiff had some contact with the Quincy, plaintiff may apply ex parte so the Court may reconsider the issue of document production. The motion is granted as to the USS Kizka. Any responsive documents shall be provided on or before December 5, 2008.
Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Court Reporter: Leticia A. Ralls, CSR # 10070
